name: oidc-acr-claims
summary: Emit `acr` + `auth_time` claims on JWT access tokens
description: Adds the `acr` and `auth_time` claims to JWT-formatted access tokens, mirroring what LemonLDAP::NG core already does for ID tokens (uses `oidcServiceMetaDataAuthnContext` when set, falls back to `loa-<level>`). Enables a Resource Server to implement RFC 9470 step-up challenges or any other policy that needs the user's authentication context — audit, FAPI 2.0 conformance, custom RS-side rules. Pure plugin, no core change required.
author: Xavier Guimard <yadd@debian.org>
